name: shuakami--uapi-get-game-minecraft-historyid
description: 使用 UAPI 的“查询 MC 曾用名”单接口 skill，处理 查询 MC 曾用名、MC曾用名 等请求。 Use when the user wants get game minecraft historyid, game minecraft historyid, historyid, minecraft player lookup, minecraft server status, minecraft name history, or when you need to call GET /game/minecraft/historyid directly.
